dashboard.label: MITRE ATT&CK Mapping
dashboard.description: Map Suricata alert signatures to MITRE ATT&CK tactics and techniques for rapid threat context.

search.query: | inputlookup suricata_settings.csv | stats latest(eval(if(setting="search_scope", value, null()))) as search_scope latest(eval(if(setting="time_choice", value, null()))) as time_choice | eval search_scope=coalesce(search_scope, "index=suricata") | eval time_choice=coalesce(time_choice, "24h") | eval earliest_tok=case(time_choice=="7d", "-7d@d", time_choice=="30d", "-30d@d", time_choice=="all", "0", true(), "-24h@h") | eval latest_tok="now"

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval signature = coalesce(signature, 'alert.signature') | lookup suricata_mitre signature OUTPUT technique_id technique_name tactic | eval technique_id = coalesce(technique_id, "Unknown") | eval technique_name = coalesce(technique_name, "Unknown") | eval tactic = coalesce(tactic, "Unknown") | stats count by tactic | sort - count

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval signature = coalesce(signature, 'alert.signature') | lookup suricata_mitre signature OUTPUT technique_id technique_name tactic | eval technique_id = coalesce(technique_id, "Unknown") | eval technique_name = coalesce(technique_name, "Unknown") | eval tactic = coalesce(tactic, "Unknown") | stats count by technique_id technique_name tactic | sort - count | head 25

$search_scope$ event_type=alert | eval signature = coalesce(signature, 'alert.signature') | lookup suricata_mitre signature OUTPUT technique_id technique_name tactic | eval technique_id = coalesce(technique_id, "Unknown") | eval technique_name = coalesce(technique_name, "Unknown") | eval tactic = coalesce(tactic, "Unknown") | stats count by signature technique_id technique_name tactic | sort - count | head 25
